title: Add EkHo Image Lab to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [EkHo Image Lab](https://ekho.re/html/saas/image_ai.html) to image
- EkHo Image Lab creates high-fidelity images by integrating the Pollinations.ai BYOP flow. Connect your account and use your own pollen balance to generate images.

Fixes #10699

gist.headline: EkHo joins the greenhouse
gist.blurb: EkHo Image Lab just sprouted in our community showcase. It's a sleek new interface for generating high-fidelity images using your own Pollen balance.
gist.summary: Added EkHo Image Lab to the community apps showcase, featuring a BYOP (Bring Your Own Pollen) integration for image generation.
gist.impact: Users can now discover EkHo Image Lab in the greenhouse and connect their accounts to generate images using their personal Pollen balance.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy digital greenhouse/laboratory hybrid. Polly the bee wearing a tiny lab coat, looking at a freshly generated image on an easel or retro monitor. Plants and code vines around.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny white lab coat, admiring a freshly painted canvas in a digital greenhouse. Code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots nearby. A chunky retro computer monitor glows softly in the background. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
